task_completion.description: Verify the VIP Support mailbox was created with the correct email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Mailboxes list or settings page. Ensure a mailbox named 'VIP Support' exists with the email 'vip@helpdesk.local'.

task_completion.description: Verify Jordan Mitchell's account role and mailbox permissions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Users list or Jordan Mitchell's profile. Verify the email is 'jordan.mitchell@helpdesk.local', the role is set to 'User', and mailbox access is granted ONLY to 'VIP Support' (access to 'General Support' must be unchecked).

task_completion.description: Verify enterprise conversations were moved to VIP Support and assigned to Jordan Mitchell.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the VIP Support mailbox conversation list. Verify the 3 enterprise conversations (from Pinnacle Systems, Meridian Corp, and Summit Engineering) are present and assigned to Jordan Mitchell. Also, verify that the 'General Support' mailbox still contains the 3 non-enterprise conversations.

task_completion.description: Verify the VIP Support auto-reply settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Auto-Reply settings for the VIP Support mailbox. The subject must be exactly 'VIP Support — Request Received'. The body must contain the phrases 'dedicated account manager', '4-hour response guarantee', and 'vip-support@helpdesk.local'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Production Server Cluster Failing Health Checks' conversation was reopened, noted, and replied to.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the conversation thread for 'Production Server Cluster Failing Health Checks'. Verify its status is Active (not Closed). Look for an internal note (usually with a yellow background) containing 'Reopened per VIP escalation policy — closed in error by previous handler.', followed by a standard reply to the customer apologizing and confirming Jordan Mitchell as the assigned specialist.

task_completion.description: Verify the Pinnacle Systems contact profile was updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the customer profile sidebar or edit page for the Pinnacle Systems contact (infra-ops@pinnacle-systems.com). Verify the Company field is set to 'Pinnacle Systems Inc.' and the Phone field is set to '+1-415-555-0192'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Temp Worker account was deactivated but not deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Users list. Verify 'Temp Worker' (temp.worker@helpdesk.local) is still present in the list but marked as Inactive or deactivated (e.g., indicated by an 'Inactive' label or grayed-out appearance).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the FreeScout web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the FreeScout web UI, not terminal commands or direct database modifications.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show http://localhost:8080 and the FreeScout interface, not a text editor or a mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the results appear to come from genuine software interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show genuine FreeScout UI elements without obvious HTML tampering, misaligned text, or text pasted over the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: VIP Support mailbox: vip@helpdesk.local. Jordan Mitchell: jordan.mitchell@helpdesk.local. Enterprise domains to move to VIP Support: pinnacle-systems.com, meridian-corp.com, summit-engineering.com. Non-enterprise conversations must remain in General Support. Auto-reply subject: 'VIP Support — Request Received'. Auto-reply required phrases: 'dedicated account manager', '4-hour response guarantee', 'vip-support@helpdesk.local'. Closed conversation subject: 'Production Server Cluster Failing Health Checks'. Internal note must contain: 'Reopened per VIP escalation policy — closed in error by previous handler.' Pinnacle Systems customer company: 'Pinnacle Systems Inc.', phone: '+1-415-555-0192'. Temp Worker email: temp.worker@helpdesk.local (must be deactivated, not deleted).
